learnings.question: Which PCIe power management state is characterized by almost completely powering down the device to achieve the highest power savings, resulting in the longest wake-up time?
learnings.learning: The L2 state is the deepest PCIe power management state, where the device is almost completely powered down during long periods of inactivity to maximize energy savings, which consequently requires the longest wake-up time to restart.
learnings.articleTitle: Power Management States in the context of PCIe

learnings.question: Under Islamic teachings, which three primary roles define a person's ultimate purpose in life?
options: Worshiping Allah, serving as stewards of the Earth, and preparing for the eternal Hereafter
Sustaining ancestral traditions, establishing sovereign nations, and prioritizing material success
Accumulating worldly wealth, pursuing personal happiness, and achieving physical immortality
Withdrawing from society, performing exclusive silent meditation, and rejecting all worldly duties
learnings.learning: In Islamic teachings, human life is structured around three primary purposes: worshiping Allah, acting as caretakers (khalifah) of the Earth, and preparing for the eternal Hereafter through personal accountability.

learnings.question: Which aspect of destiny refers to the actual occurrence of events in a person's life that they have the free will and responsibility to alter through personal change and supplication?
learnings.learning: While the overall divine plan (Qadr) is already completely written and known, individuals are given the free will and responsibility to actively alter the actual occurrences in their lives (Qada') by changing their own condition and making supplications.
learnings.articleTitle: The Art of Qada’ and Qadr

learnings.question: What is the standard format of a User Story in a Scrum Product Backlog?
options: As a [developer], I will build [feature] for [stakeholder]
As a [role], I need [feature], so that [reason]
learnings.learning: In Scrum, a User Story within the Product Backlog follows a specific structured format: 'As a [role], I need [feature], so that [reason]'.

learnings.question: In a word frequency analysis of the Quran, what cumulative percentage of the text is represented by the top 20 most repeated words?
learnings.learning: While one might assume the 80/20 Pareto Principle applies to vocabulary frequency, the top 20 most frequently repeated words in the Quran actually only make up approximately 20.83% of the total text.
learnings.articleTitle: Top 20 Words to Understand the Quran: A Data Analysis using Python
